tool.name: map_runtime_surface
tool.description: Map the runtime attack surface from captured proxy requests and sitemap entries, normalize dynamic paths, and auto-seed the shared coverage ledger with observed endpoints.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Logical target label for the assessment ledger.

parameter.name: max_request_pages
parameter.description: How many request-history pages to inspect from the proxy. Default: 2.

parameter.name: max_sitemap_pages
parameter.description: How many sitemap pages to inspect for root domains and descendants. Default: 2.

parameter.name: page_size
parameter.description: How many requests to read per proxy page. Default: 50.

parameter.name: max_seed_items
parameter.description: Maximum number of normalized endpoints to seed into the coverage ledger. Default: 40.

parameter.name: sample_request_details
parameter.description: How many raw request samples to inspect for auth and content-type hints. Default: 12.

parameter.name: scope_id
parameter.description: Optional Caido scope identifier to constrain the runtime mapping.

parameter.name: httpql_filter
parameter.description: Optional HTTPQL filter for request history narrowing before inventory extraction.

tool.name: list_runtime_inventory
tool.description: List previously mapped runtime inventory records stored for the current root assessment.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Optional logical target label. When provided, only the matching runtime inventory record is returned.

parameter.name: include_inventory
parameter.description: Whether to include the stored normalized inventory items in the response. Default: true.

parameter.name: max_items
parameter.description: Maximum number of runtime inventory records to return. Default: 50.
